name_en: 🌷《With full original green box packaging》🌷Children's Rabbit Print Tote Bag. The 2024 Early Spring Children's Collection ingeniously blends circular interlocking double-G and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting the tailored style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in various colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci rabbit print, cleverly incorporating a red contrasting trim. Multi-colored Supreme canvas, red Supreme canvas trim, Gucci rabbit print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.

Multi-colored Supreme canvas, red Supreme canvas trim, Gucci rabbit print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
Model: 605614.
Dimensions: 25(L) x 28.5(W) x 11cm(T)
Color: Red/pvc rabbit print.
Made in Italy
